title: Snake
touch: Swipe or use the on-screen D-pad.

title: Chrome Dino
tagline: Endless runner — jump the cacti, duck the birds.
keyboard: Space / Up to jump, Down to duck.
touch: Tap to jump, hold-swipe down to duck.

title: Flappy Bird
tagline: Tap to fly through the gaps.

title: Mario Clone
keyboard: Arrows/WASD to move, Space to jump.

title: Pac-Man Clone
tagline: Eat dots, dodge ghosts, grab power pellets.

title: Breakout
keyboard: Left/Right or A/D to move paddle.

title: Tetris
tagline: Stack the falling blocks, clear lines.
keyboard: Arrows to move/rotate, Space to hard-drop, C to hold.

title: Space Invaders
tagline: Defend Earth from the swarm — and the boss.
keyboard: Left/Right to move, Space to fire.

title: Beat The Boss
tagline: Weapon-based boss battles, best of 3 rounds.
keyboard: Arrows to move, Z to attack, X to block, 1-3 to switch weapon.
